headline: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of credit scoring and analytics company FICO (NYSE:FICO) fell 4.8% in the afternoon session after prominent investor Steve Eisman disclosed a short position in the company, a move that overshadowed a strong earnings report and guidance increase.
